turns.text: We will hear arguments this morning in Dennis Lynch against Donnelly. Mr. McMahon, you may proceed whenever you are ready. ON EEHALF OF THE PETITIONERS

turns.name: MC MAHON
turns.text: Thank you, Mr. Chief Justice, The issue in this case is whether the establishment clause prohibits a municipality from including a creche in a traditional and dominantly Rhode Island, has for over 40 years sponsored an annual Christmas celebration. It consists of parties, buildings, and a display situated on the grounds of a 40-foot high lighted spruce tree, figures of Santa Claus, a live Santa Claus, and various figures of stars and bells and lights and a large Season's Greetings, 48 feet long and lighted. Included in this display, covering approximately 140 square feet out of the total 40,000 square foot area, is a creche. QUESTION; Has the creche been there for 40 years, used every year for 40 years? Does the record show that?

turns.name: MC MAHON
